statement: In every magma, Equation 785 (`x = y * (z * ((z * z) * w))`) implies Equation 4516 (`x * (y * z) = (x * z) * z`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0284
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op y (op z (op (op z z) w)))) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, (op x (op y z)) = (op (op x z) z)
